title: save_block_state atomic transaction design: tree+witnesses+tip must remain one atomic write
description: db.rs save_block_state() wraps CommitmentTree snapshot, witness updates, and scan_tip advance in one SQLite transaction. This is correct and necessary. A crash between any two writes would leave witnesses inconsistent with scan_tip, causing note unspendability or wrong proofs on restart. Do not split into separate helper methods.
